title: Facilities Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate operations and functionalities of facilities and buildings. May include surrounding grounds or multiple facilities of an organization's campus.

tasks.text: Monitor the facility to ensure that it remains safe, secure, and well-maintained.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Oversee the maintenance and repair of machinery, equipment, and electrical and mechanical systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee construction and renovation projects to improve efficiency and to ensure that facilities meet environmental, health, and security standards, and comply with government regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, administer, and control budgets for contracts, equipment, and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in architectural and engineering planning and design, including space and installation management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set goals and deadlines for the department.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct classes to teach procedures to staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and review operational reports and schedules to ensure accuracy and efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dispose of, or oversee the disposal of, surplus or unclaimed property.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
